steps.title: Rewrite to match the target form
steps.content: Pull the $\tfrac{1}{4}$ out of the exponent so the outer power is $x$:$$f(x)=(1.69)^{x/4}=\left((1.69)^{1/4}\right)^{x}.$$Set this equal to $\left(1+\tfrac{p}{100}\right)^{x}$ and match the bases:$$1+\frac{p}{100}=(1.69)^{1/4}.$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $14$: differs from 14.02 by about 0.02 — closest match.
  • B) $18$: would need $(1.18)^4\approx 1.94$ — too big.
  • C) $39$: $1.39^4\approx 3.73$ — far too big.
  • D) $86$: $1.86^4\approx 11.97$ — far too big.
That matches Choice A — $14$.
